Package index

Plotting

Core geom and positioning for brain plots

geom_brain()
Plot brain atlas regions
position_brain()
Arrange brain atlas views
annotate_brain()
Add view labels to brain atlas plots
coord_brain()
Keep brain shapes undistorted
reposition_brain()
Reposition brain slices

Data

Joining user data to brain atlases

brain_join()
Join user data with a brain atlas

Scales

Colour scales for brain plots

scale_brain() scale_colour_brain() scale_color_brain() scale_fill_brain()
Colour and fill scales from brain atlas palettes
scale_brain2() scale_colour_brain2() scale_color_brain2() scale_fill_brain2()
Deprecated scale functions
scale_brain_manual() scale_colour_brain_manual() scale_color_brain_manual() scale_fill_brain_manual()
Manual colour and fill scales for brain plots
scale_continous_brain() scale_x_brain() scale_y_brain() scale_labs_brain()
Axis and label scales for brain atlas plots

Themes

ggplot themes for brain plots

theme_brain() theme_darkbrain() theme_custombrain() theme_brain2()
Themes for brain atlas plots

On this page

Part of the ggsegverse — Gross Geometry Brain Segmentation Universe
